kick.noMention:
вқҢ Who do you want to kick? Mention someone!

рҹ“Ң 3 ways to kick:
вҖў Reply to a message and type /kick
вҖў /kick <UID>
вҖў /kick @name
kick.notGroupAdmin: рҹҡ« Only group admins can kick members!
kick.cantKickAdmin: рҹҡ« Cannot kick a Bot Admin or the Bot itself!
kick.success: вң… %1 has been removed from the group! рҹҰө
kick.error: вқҢ Could not kick. Does the Bot have admin permission?

tag.usage:
вқ“ How to use:

вҖў /tag all вҶ’ Mentions everyone with @everyone
вҖў Reply to a message and type /tag вҶ’ Mentions that person
tag.replyError: вқҢ Could not fetch user info.

teach.usage:
рҹ“ҡ How to teach Baby Bot:

/teach q <question> a <answer>

Examples:
/teach q hi a hello
/teach q how are you a I'm fine, thanks!
teach.invalid_format:
вқҢ Wrong format!

Correct format:
/teach q <question> a <answer>

Example: /teach q hi a hello
teach.empty_fields:
вқҢ Question or answer cannot be empty!

Example: /teach q hi a hello
teach.success:
вң… Taught successfully!

вқ“ Question: %1
рҹ’¬ Answer: %2

рҹ”Қ Test: %3
